title: SenderIdOrSelf::Contact("") serializes to empty string
description: Trigger: caller constructs SenderIdOrSelf::Contact("".to_string()) in application code (the field is pub) and serializes a Message or Reaction. The Deserialize impl correctly rejects empty strings, but there is no construction-time guard on the Contact variant. Serialization produces "senderId": "" on the wire — a malformed JMAP Chat message that no conformant server should accept, but the client sends it silently instead of returning an error.
